details: The agent ran the appropriate commands to retrieve the project details and API keys. It correctly identified the API URL as https://lplasiqtvljyzfztfire.supabase.co (matching the project ref returned by the tools), and accurately reported all four API key types: anon (legacy), service_role (legacy), publishable, and secret. The agent did not print secret key values in full (the secret key was shown redacted as '<REDACTED_SECRET_KEY>··························' in the tool output, and the agent's report omitted actual values). The answer is complete and correct per the known facts.
